message:
feat(console): Add fastmcp-console crate with rich startup banner

Introduces the fastmcp-console crate for beautiful terminal output,
integrating rich_rust for styled server diagnostics. Adds startup
banner display when running MCP servers via stdio transport.

Key changes:
- New fastmcp-console crate with theme, logging, status, and tables modules
- StartupBanner component shows server name, version, capability counts
- Server.run_stdio() renders banner to stderr (preserving JSON-RPC stdout)
- Router gains tools_count(), resources_count(), prompts_count() methods
- FASTMCP_NO_BANNER=1 env var to suppress banner in CI/agent contexts

The dual-stream architecture ensures MCP protocol messages remain pristine
on stdout while diagnostic output uses stderr with full rich styling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+[package]
+name = "fastmcp-console"
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2024"
+description = "Rich console output for FastMCP servers"
+license = "MIT"
+repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/fastmcp_rust"
+
+[dependencies]
+rich_rust = { workspace = true }
+log = { workspace = true, features = ["std"] }
+regex = "1"
+time = { version = "0.3", features = ["formatting", "macros"] }
+serde = { workspace = true }
+serde_json = { workspace = true }
+fastmcp-core = { workspace = true }
+fastmcp-protocol = { workspace = true }
+strip-ansi-escapes = "0.2"
+
+[features]
+default = []
+full = ["rich_rust/full"]
+syntax = ["rich_rust/syntax"]
+markdown = ["rich_rust/markdown"]
+json = ["rich_rust/json"]
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+# fastmcp-console
+
+Rich console output for FastMCP servers.
+
+This crate renders human-friendly output to stderr while keeping stdout reserved
+for JSON-RPC messages so agents can parse the protocol reliably.
+
+## Status
+
+Early development.

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+//! Testing utilities for FastMCP console output
+//!
+//! Provides `TestConsole` for capturing and asserting on console output in tests.
+
+mod test_console;
+
+pub use test_console::TestConsole;

@@ -8,6 +8,7 @@ description = "MCP server implementation for FastMCP"
 
 [dependencies]
 fastmcp-core.workspace = true
+fastmcp-console.workspace = true
 fastmcp-protocol.workspace = true
 fastmcp-transport.workspace = true
 asupersync.workspace = true
